latest_news.headline: Trump: 'No ceasefire' with Iran - 'you don't ceasefire when obliterating'
latest_news.text: Trump explicitly rules out ceasefire: 'You don't do a ceasefire when you're literally obliterating the other side.' Contradicts earlier 'winding down' rhetoric. Major hawkish pivot.

latest_news.headline: Pentagon deploys 3 more warships + 2,500 Marines to Middle East
latest_news.text: Pentagon announces 3 additional warships and 2,500 Marines deploying to Middle East. Combined with earlier deployments, massive US military buildup continues.

latest_news.headline: Iran FM Araghchi rejects dialogue with United States
latest_news.text: Iran Foreign Minister Araghchi explicitly rejects any dialogue with the United States. Diplomatic off-ramp closed.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: NEW: Israel strikes Sweida province Syria (Druze protection). Saudi + Turkey condemn. Potential new tracker trigger - monitoring.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 75% (up). Day 22 Hour 08 - IMMINENT. Fresh Beirut strikes 3am (7 neighborhoods). 12 medical workers killed in health center strike. Netanyahu: 'ground component needed' for all fronts. Ongoing bombardment. Updated 2026-03-21T08:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut - 7 neighborhoods evacuated
latest_news.text: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut early Saturday. Evacuation warnings for 7 neighborhoods in southern suburbs. Jets bombed Beirut at 3am. Ghandouriyeh house strike kills 1, wounds 2.

latest_news.headline: WaPo: Israel strikes Hezbollah health center, kills 12 medical workers
latest_news.text: Israeli strike hit Hezbollah-run health center in southern Lebanon, killed 12 medical workers. Israel widens campaign beyond fighters to civilian infrastructure.

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

latest_news.headline: Putin's forces suffer DEADLIEST day of 2026 - 1,610 killed in 24h
latest_news.text: Russian forces suffer deadliest day of 2026: 1,610 killed in past 24 hours. Total Russian casualties since Feb 2022 now approximately 1,285,700. Fighting intense despite peace talk pauses.

latest_news.headline: Ukrainian drone swarms target Moscow overnight
latest_news.text: Swarms of Ukrainian drones targeted Moscow overnight, mayor confirms. Russian air defense intercepted attacks. Continued deep-strike capability demonstration.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 06. DE-ESCALATION: Trump 'winding down' rhetoric (no ceasefire), US eases oil sanctions, Iran selectively opens Hormuz for Japan, oil at $107 (down from $119). ESCALATION: Fresh Tehran + Beirut strikes, 20 killed Lebanon, medical workers killed, UK base access expanded, Iran warns British lives, 20+ Saudi drones intercepted overnight, ground invasion rhetoric continues, Hormuz still effectively closed. NET: Military operations intensifying despite diplomatic off-ramp signals.

latest_news.headline: Iran military threatens tourist sites worldwide - Gen Shekarchi
latest_news.text: Iran's top military spokesperson Gen Shekarchi warns 'parks, recreational areas and tourist destinations' globally will not be safe for enemies. Renewed concerns Tehran may use militant attacks beyond Middle East.

latest_news.headline: Trump considers 'winding down' + eases oil sanctions on Iran
latest_news.text: Trump says considering 'winding down' military efforts. US Treasury eases Iranian oil sanctions. Iran official: no reduction in military activity. Mixed signals.

latest_news.headline: Saudi Arabia + Kuwait intercept drones overnight
latest_news.text: Saudi intercepts 24+ drones in eastern region overnight. Kuwait also intercepting missile and drone attacks. Sustained Iranian bombardment continues.

latest_news.headline: Russia-Ukraine: 1,700+ Russian KIA - deadliest day of 2026
latest_news.text: Russian forces suffer deadliest day of 2026: 1,700+ killed in 24h. 30 Ukrainian drones shot down over Moscow overnight. Fighting intensifies.

latest_news.headline: Zelensky sends political delegation only to Mar 21 US talks - Russia not attending
latest_news.text: Zelensky says Ukraine sends only political delegation to Mar 21 US talks. Russia not attending. Cites lack of 'political will' from Moscow.

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 22, 08:04 UTC) — Day 21 of Iran war. Trump 'no ceasefire' + 'winding down' contradictory. Netanyahu signals ground invasion. Fresh Tehran+Beirut strikes overnight. Iran warns 'zero restraint'. F-35 emergency landing. NATO allies 'cowards'. Russia-Ukraine: aftermath of deadliest day. Pakistan-Afghanistan ceasefire through Mar 24. Updated 2026-03-21T08:04:00Z
